name: Pasta Nicoise
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in boiling, slightly salted water until al dente, 10 to 12 minutes.
2. Drain well and rinse under cold water. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the pasta, bell pepper, tomatoes, beans; add the olives and capers.
4. Mix the oil, vinegar, garlic, salt, and pepper and pour over the pasta.
5. Toss well just before serving.
